action: In index.html, audit renderTable() and openV2Modal() for all score interpolations. Replace bare `${score}` patterns with `${score != null ? score : 'N/A'}` or a helper like `fmt(score)`. Also check scores.html, trscode-scores.html, truscore-scores.html, trfcast-scores.html, tragents-scores.html for the same pattern. Apply null-coalescing globally.
